# ## Tags: @sddf
# some_other_trigger = {
#     always = yes
# }

# blah blah
# wheee
## Tags: @test
plugin_test_kilos_trigger = {
    # WARNING: The contents of this block are generated by script, any manual changes will be overwritten
    or = {
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_artillery_0 # Asteroid Artillery Framework
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_artillery_1 # Asteroid Artillery
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_artillery_1_fake # Asteroid Artillery
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_artillery_repaired # Asteroid Artillery
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_artillery_ruined # Wrecked Asteroid Artillery
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_0 # Asteroid Industrial Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_2 # Asteroid Autofactory
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_ai_alloys # Asteroid Industrial Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_ai_consumer_goods # Asteroid Industrial Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_ai_energy # Asteroid Industrial Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_ai_food # Asteroid Industrial Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_ai_supertensiles # Asteroid Industrial Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_alloys # Bulk Ore Extractor
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_consumer_goods # Asteroid Manufactory
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_energy # Fusion Fuel Depot
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_food # Ice Harvesting Station
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_platform_alloys # Bulk Ore Extractor Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_platform_consumer_goods # Asteroid Manufactory Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_platform_energy # Fusion Fuel Depot Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_platform_food # Ice Harvesting Station Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_platform_supertensiles # Megaconstruction Materials Foundry Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_manufactory_supertensiles # Megaconstruction Materials Foundry
        $CONDITION$ = atmosphere_shredder_0 # Atmospheric Storm Observatory: Storm Eye
        $CONDITION$ = atmosphere_shredder_1 # Atmospheric Storm Observatory: Agitator Arms
        $CONDITION$ = atmosphere_shredder_2 # Atmospheric Storm Observatory: Stabilizer Arms
        $CONDITION$ = atmosphere_shredder_3 # Atmospheric Storm Observatory: Laboratory Ring
        $CONDITION$ = atmosphere_shredder_restored # Atmospheric Storm Observatory
        $CONDITION$ = atmosphere_shredder_ruined # Ruined Atmospheric Storm Observatory
        $CONDITION$ = automated_stripmine_0 # Automated Strip Mine Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = automated_stripmine_1 # Automated Strip Mine
        $CONDITION$ = crystal_megabore_0 # Crystal Megabore Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = crystal_megabore_1 # Crystal Megabore
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_swarm_1 # Dyson Swarm: Array
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_swarm_2 # Dyson Swarm: Constellation
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_swarm_3 # Dyson Swarm
        $CONDITION$ = ehof_pgate_gateway # Primordial Pillar
        $CONDITION$ = ehof_pgate_unknown # Mysterious Stone
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_outpost_construction # Planetary Outpost
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_outpost_construction_hive # Planetary Outpost
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_outpost_construction_hive_lithoid # Planetary Outpost
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_outpost_construction_im # Planetary Outpost
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_outpost_construction_lithoid # Planetary Outpost
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_outpost_construction_machine # Planetary Outpost
        $CONDITION$ = gateway_0 # Gateway
        $CONDITION$ = gateway_final # Gateway
        $CONDITION$ = gateway_restored # Gateway
        $CONDITION$ = gateway_ruined # Disabled Gateway
        $CONDITION$ = habitat_central_complex # Habitat Central Complex

        $CONDITION$ = habitat_central_complex_ruined # Ruined Habitat Central Complex

        $CONDITION$ = hyper_relay_restored # Hyper Relay

        $CONDITION$ = kugelblitz_ruined # Ruined Kugelblitz Containment Silo
        $CONDITION$ = lgate_base # L-Gate
        $CONDITION$ = macro_stabilizer_0 # Macroatmospheric Stabilizer Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = macro_stabilizer_1 # Macroatmospheric Stabilizer Magnetorings
        $CONDITION$ = macro_stabilizer_2 # Macroatmospheric Stabilizer
        $CONDITION$ = macro_test_site_0 # Macroengineering Testing Station: Geo-Stabilizer
        $CONDITION$ = macro_test_site_1 # Macroengineering Testing Station: Material Testing Bays
        $CONDITION$ = macro_test_site_2 # Macroengineering Testing Station: Material Simulations

        $CONDITION$ = macro_test_site_restored # Macroengineering Testing Station

        $CONDITION$ = orbital_ring_restored # Orbital Ring

}

plugin_test_gigas_trigger = {
    # WARNING: The contents of this block are generated by script, any manual changes will be overwritten
    or = {
        $CONDITION$ = aeternum_planetcraft_restored # Aeternite Planetcraft
        $CONDITION$ = aeternum_planetcraft_ruined # Wrecked Aeternite Planetcraft
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_0 # Alderson Disk Construction Site
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_1 # Alderson Disk Frame
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_ecu_restored_center_complete # Ecumenopolis Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_ecu_restored_left_complete # Ecumenopolis Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_ecu_restored_right_complete # Ecumenopolis Alderson
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_gaia_restored_center_complete # Gaia Alderson Slice
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_gaia_restored_left_complete # Gaia Alderson Slice
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_gaia_restored_right_complete # Gaia Alderson Slice
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_hive_restored_center_complete # Hive Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_hive_restored_left_complete # Hive Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_hive_restored_right_complete # Hive Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_machine_restored_center_complete # Machine Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_machine_restored_left_complete # Machine Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_machine_restored_right_complete # Machine Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_pc_restored_center_complete # Alderson Computing Complex

        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_pc_restored_right_complete # Alderson Computing Complex
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_ecu # Ecumenopolis Alderson
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_gaia # Gaia Alderson Slice

        $CONDITION$ = war_system_4 # Systemcraft Celestial Erasers
        $CONDITION$ = war_system_5 # Stellar Systemcraft
    }

}

plugin_test_ruined_trigger = {
    # WARNING: The contents of this block are generated by script, any manual changes will be overwritten
    or = {
        $CONDITION$ = aeternum_planetcraft_ruined # Wrecked Aeternite Planetcraft
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_ruined_center # Ruined Alderson Disk Hypersegment
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_ruined_left # Ruined Alderson Disk Hypersegment
        $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_ruined_right # Ruined Alderson Disk Hypersegment
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_artillery_ruined # Wrecked Asteroid Artillery
        $CONDITION$ = crisis_sphere_ruined # Ruined Aetherophasic Engine Frame
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_sphere_ruined # Ruined Dyson Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_sphere_ruined_a_star # Ruined Dyson Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_sphere_ruined_b_star # Ruined Dyson Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_sphere_ruined_f_star # Ruined Dyson Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_sphere_ruined_g_star # Ruined Dyson Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_sphere_ruined_k_star # Ruined Dyson Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_sphere_ruined_m_giant_star # Ruined Dyson Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = dyson_sphere_ruined_m_star # Ruined Dyson Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = ehof_megastructure_ruined # Ruined E.H.O.F. Lambda
        $CONDITION$ = ehof_megastructure_ruined_origin # Ruined E.H.O.F. Alpha
        $CONDITION$ = ehof_presphere_ruined # Ruined Preservation Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = gateway_ruined # Disabled Gateway
        $CONDITION$ = giga_battleship_ruined # Wrecked Battleships
        $CONDITION$ = giga_colossus_ruined # Wrecked Colossus
        $CONDITION$ = giga_juggernaut_ruined # Wrecked Juggernaut
        $CONDITION$ = giga_titan_ruined # Wrecked Titan
        $CONDITION$ = habitat_central_complex_ruined # Ruined Habitat Central Complex
        $CONDITION$ = hyper_relay_ruined # Ruined Hyper Relay
        $CONDITION$ = interstellar_assembly_ruined # Ruined Interstellar Assembly
        $CONDITION$ = kugelblitz_ruined # Ruined Kugelblitz Containment Silo
        $CONDITION$ = macro_test_site_ruined # Ruined Macroengineering Testing Station
        $CONDITION$ = matter_decompressor_ruined # Ruined Matter Decompressor
        $CONDITION$ = mega_art_installation_ruined # Ruined Mega Art Installation
        $CONDITION$ = mega_shipyard_ruined # Ruined Mega Shipyard
        $CONDITION$ = neutronium_gigaforge_ruined # Ruined Neutronium Gigaforge
        $CONDITION$ = orbital_artificial_eco_ruined # Ruined Orbital Artificial Ecosystem
        $CONDITION$ = quantum_catapult_permanently_ruined # Ruined Quantum Catapult
        $CONDITION$ = quantum_catapult_ruined # Ruined Quantum Catapult
        $CONDITION$ = quantum_catapult_ruined_slingshot # Ruined Quantum Catapult
        $CONDITION$ = r_square_world_hub # Derelict Station
        $CONDITION$ = r_square_world_ruined # Ruined Squareworld
        $CONDITION$ = relic_penrose_sphere_1 # Relic Penrose Sphere
        $CONDITION$ = ring_world_behemoth_ruined # Ruined Behemoth Ringworld
        $CONDITION$ = ring_world_gargantuan_ruined # Ruined Gargantuan Ringworld
        $CONDITION$ = ring_world_ruined # Ruined Ring Section
        $CONDITION$ = ring_world_titanic_ruined # Ruined Titanic Ringworld
        $CONDITION$ = spy_orb_ruined # Ruined Sentry Array
        $CONDITION$ = stellar_ring_habitat_ruined # Ruined Stellar Ring Habitat
        $CONDITION$ = strategic_coordination_center_ruined # Ruined Strategic Coordination Center
        $CONDITION$ = think_tank_ruined # Ruined Science Nexus
        $CONDITION$ = war_moon_debris_barren # Wrecked Attack Moon
        $CONDITION$ = war_moon_debris_cold_barren # Wrecked Attack Moon
        $CONDITION$ = war_moon_debris_disco # Wrecked Attack Moon
        $CONDITION$ = war_moon_debris_frozen # Wrecked Attack Moon
        $CONDITION$ = war_moon_debris_luna # Wrecked Attack Moon
        $CONDITION$ = war_moon_debris_molten # Wrecked Attack Moon
        $CONDITION$ = war_planet_debris # Wrecked Behemoth Planetcraft
        $CONDITION$ = yggdrasil_orchid_ruined # Ruined Yggdrasil Orchid Complex
    }

}

plugin_test_restored_trigger = {
    # WARNING: The contents of this block are generated by script, any manual changes will be overwritten
    or = {
        $CONDITION$ = aeternum_planetcraft_restored # Aeternite Planetcraft
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_ecu_restored_center_complete # Ecumenopolis Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_ecu_restored_left_complete # Ecumenopolis Alderson
        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_ecu_restored_right_complete # Ecumenopolis Alderson

        # $CONDITION$ = alderson_disk_2_construction_pc_restored_right_complete # Alderson Computing Complex
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_artillery_repaired # Asteroid Artillery

plugin_test_technical_trigger = {
    # WARNING: The contents of this block are generated by script, any manual changes will be overwritten
    or = {
        $CONDITION$ = asteroid_artillery_config # Manage Upgrades
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_dummy_lgate # blokkat_dummy_lgate
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_dummy_mega # blokkat_dummy_mega
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_harvester_charged # Blokk-Dismantler Harvesting
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_harvester_charged_mothership # Blokkat-Vester Harvesting
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_harvester_charging_up # Blokk-Dismantler Powering Up
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_harvester_charging_up_mothership # Blokkat-Vester Powering Up
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_prison_1_manage # Manage Containment Nexus
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_shield_killer_activate # Activate Hyperdimensional Destabilizer
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_shield_killer_activate_chrono # Activate Hyperdimensional Destabilizer
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_shipyard_build_custodians # Fabricate 10 Blokk-Custodians - 100 YJ
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_shipyard_build_dismantler # Fabricate 1 Blokk-Dismantler - 2000 YJ
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_shipyard_build_evictors # Fabricate 30 Blokk-Evictors - 50 YJ
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_shipyard_build_terminator # Fabricate 1 Blokk-Terminator - 1000 YJ
        $CONDITION$ = blokkat_star_fix_active # Activate Restorator
        $CONDITION$ = compound_wormhole_ehof # Event Horizon Manipulator
        $CONDITION$ = compound_wormhole_portal # Micro Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = ehof_megastructure_wormhole_destination # Micro Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = ehof_trader_wormhole_01 # Urmazin Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = ehof_trader_wormhole_external # Urmazin Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_harvest_0 # Asteroid Harvest
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_salvage_habitat_0 # Salvage Habitat
        $CONDITION$ = giga_hyper_relay_ai_site # Hyper Relay Site
        $CONDITION$ = katzen_ehof_wormhole # Katzen Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = lunar_macroreplicator_make_moon # Fabricate Attack Moon
        $CONDITION$ = moon_printer_orbital_mass_harvester_0 # Planetary Matter Harvester
        $CONDITION$ = moon_printer_orbital_mass_harvester_1 # Active Planetary Matter Harvester
        $CONDITION$ = nicoll_beam_firing # Nicoll-Dyson Beam (Firing)
        $CONDITION$ = nicoll_beam_menu # Nicoll-Dyson Beam
        $CONDITION$ = nicoll_beam_targetting # Select a target
        $CONDITION$ = planetcraft_printer_make_planet # Fabricate Behemoth Planetcraft
        $CONDITION$ = psychic_beacon_4 # Activate the beacon
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_gateway_off # QS-O Gateway
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_gateway_on # Active QS-O Gateway
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_marker_planet # QS-O Target Marker
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_marker_planet_firing # QS-O Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_marker_planet_open # QS-O Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_marker_star # QS-O Target Marker
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_marker_star_firing # QS-O Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_marker_star_open # QS-O Wormhole
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_obliterator_6 # QS-Obliterator Control Panel
        $CONDITION$ = quasi_stellar_obliterator_firing_1 # Quasi-Stellar Obliterator

        $CONDITION$ = r_square_world_hub_garyx # Contact Garyx
        $CONDITION$ = substellar_compressor_7 # Dismantle Substellar Compressor
    }

}

plugin_test_megaproject_trigger = {
    # WARNING: The contents of this block are generated by script, any manual changes will be overwritten
    or = {
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_harvest_0 # Asteroid Harvest
        $CONDITION$ = frameworld_salvage_habitat_0 # Salvage Habitat
        $CONDITION$ = giga_battleship_restored # Restored Battleships
        $CONDITION$ = giga_battleship_ruined # Wrecked Battleships
        $CONDITION$ = giga_colossus_restored # Restored Colossus
        $CONDITION$ = giga_colossus_ruined # Wrecked Colossus
        $CONDITION$ = giga_juggernaut_restored # Restored Juggernaut
        $CONDITION$ = giga_juggernaut_ruined # Wrecked Juggernaut
        $CONDITION$ = giga_titan_restored # Restored Titan
        $CONDITION$ = giga_titan_ruined # Wrecked Titan
    }

}
